## What changed

Brief description of the change and why it matters.

## How to test

1. Run `npm run build`
2. Verify affected sections/pages visually
3. Confirm no sensitive contact info in source

## Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No email/phone/WhatsApp exposed in UI or code
- [ ] No console errors on affected pages
- [ ] Mobile layout checked
- [ ] README/CHANGELOG updated if needed
